case_title: BRIAN GIRDY VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GIRDY, BRIAN AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-28-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-20-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-28-2021 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF BRIAN GIRDY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, REPRESENTED BY RYON HAYWARD, CLAIMS INVESTIGATOR IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GIRDY, BRIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,065.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
